text.title: Google Ads Optimization Cycle Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree on observable signals. Every leaf points to a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Is account ≥30 days old AND last learning-phase change ≥14 days ago?

conclusion.verdict: use target-CPA or target-ROAS smart bidding
use maximize-conversions or manual CPC (per 30/100 buckets)

text.example: stable history, 95 conv/mo (30-100 bucket) → maximize-conversions strategy.
